case_title: GALLEMAERT, RENEE vs. JOURNET, JACQUES et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-08-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-08-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC: WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-30-1995 CONTINUED FROM SEP-08-1995 TO OCT-10-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-08-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-08-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION. HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF GALLEMAERT, RENEE

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLEMAERT, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT JOURNET, JACQUES DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-08-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-09-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-19-1995
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
